name: Attention to Naturalistic Animal Stimuli fMRI
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds000233) probing how attentional goals reshape responses to naturalistic audiovisual clips of animal behavior. Used to study attention's role in social and category-level perception.
citation: Nastase SA, et al. (2018). Attention selectively reshapes the geometry of distributed semantic representation. Frontiers in Neuroscience, 12, 316.
